name: JC's life
overview: Around J.C. we find the apostles Peter, Simon and Judas, as well as Mary, Mary Magdalene, Pontius Pilate, John the Baptist. Cartoon characters and short scenes, each episode tackles the great stories around JC's life with lightness and humor.

trailers.title: "JC, fais péter un petit miracle !!" - La vie de JC - pt1
